# Premier Party Cruises

> Austin's premier BYOB party boat rental service on Lake Travis since 2009. Specializing in bachelor parties, bachelorette parties, corporate events, birthdays, and private cruises with 15+ years experience and 150,000+ happy customers. Last updated: January 7, 2026.

Premier Party Cruises is Austin's longest-running party boat and event cruise operator on Lake Travis. We operate a fleet of four boats departing from Anderson Mill Marina (13993 FM 2769, Leander, TX 78641). All cruises are BYOB (21+) and operated by licensed captains with a perfect safety record.

We offer two primary experiences: the ATX Disco Cruise (shared multi-group bachelor/bachelorette party cruise) and Private Boat Rentals (exclusive use for any event type).

## Core Services

- [ATX Disco Cruise](https://premierpartycruises.com/atx-disco-cruise): All-inclusive multi-group bachelor/bachelorette party cruise with DJ, photographer, floats, and party supplies included. $85-105 per person for 4-hour cruises.
- [Private Cruises](https://premierpartycruises.com/private-cruises): Exclusive boat rentals for groups of 14-75 guests. Starting at $200/hour with captain, crew, sound system, and coolers.
- [Bachelor Party Austin](https://premierpartycruises.com/bachelor-party-austin): Complete guide to planning epic bachelor parties on Lake Travis.
- [Bachelorette Party Austin](https://premierpartycruises.com/bachelorette-party-austin): Austin's most popular bachelorette party boat experience.

## Fleet Information

- [Day Tripper](https://premierpartycruises.com/private-cruises): 14 guests maximum, perfect for intimate gatherings and small groups.
- [Meeseeks](https://premierpartycruises.com/private-cruises): 30 guests maximum, ideal for medium-sized groups.
- [The Irony](https://premierpartycruises.com/private-cruises): 30 guests maximum, identical to Meeseeks.
- [Clever Girl](https://premierpartycruises.com/private-cruises): 75 guests maximum, flagship boat with 14 disco balls and giant Texas flag.

## ATX Disco Cruise Details

The ATX Disco Cruise is the only all-inclusive multi-group bachelor/bachelorette disco cruise in the United States. Groups celebrate together in a high-energy party environment.

Schedule and pricing (tax + gratuity included):
- Friday 12:00 PM - 4:00 PM: $95 per person
- Saturday 11:00 AM - 3:00 PM: $105 per person
- Saturday 3:30 PM - 7:30 PM: $85 per person

What's included: Professional DJ, professional photographer, 25-foot unicorn float, lily pad floats, private cooler with ice, secure storage, bubble wands, cups, and party supplies.

## Private Cruise Pricing

- [Day Tripper (1-14 guests)](https://premierpartycruises.com/private-cruises): $200/hour weekdays, $225/hour weekends, 4-hour minimum
- [Meeseeks/Irony (15-25 guests)](https://premierpartycruises.com/private-cruises): $300/hour weekdays, $325/hour weekends, 4-hour minimum
- [Clever Girl (31-75 guests)](https://premierpartycruises.com/private-cruises): $450/hour weekdays, $500/hour weekends, 4-hour minimum

## Event Types

- [Birthday Parties](https://premierpartycruises.com/birthday-parties): Milestone birthday celebrations on the water for groups of all sizes.
- [Corporate Events](https://premierpartycruises.com/corporate-events): Team building, company outings, and client entertainment.
- [Wedding Parties](https://premierpartycruises.com/wedding-parties): Rehearsal dinners, bachelor/bachelorette parties, and wedding weekend events.

- [Austin Bachelor Party Ideas](https://premierpartycruises.com/austin-bachelor-party-ideas): Alternative activities and suggestions for the perfect bachelor weekend.
- [What to Bring Guide](https://premierpartycruises.com/blogs/what-to-bring-party-boat): Essential packing list for your Lake Travis cruise.
- [Gallery](https://premierpartycruises.com/gallery): Photos from real parties on Lake Travis.
- [Testimonials & FAQ](https://premierpartycruises.com/testimonials-faq): Customer reviews and frequently asked questions.
- [Blog](https://premierpartycruises.com/blogs): 77+ articles on Austin party planning and Lake Travis guides.
